acquisition method: Using the data-independent acquisition mode, full MS scans were acquired every 3 s
alkylation reagent: modified with 10-mM iodacetamide for 30 min at 24 °C
alkylation concentration: modified with 10-mM iodacetamide for 30 min at 24 °C
cleavage agent: rehydrated with 17-μL 25-mM ammonium hydrogen carbonate containing 4.5-ng/µL sequencing grade trypsin
collision energy: for higher-energy collisional (HCD) dissociation at a normalized collision energy of 30%
fractionation method: The crude venom set aside prior to RNA extraction was first fractionated by 1D-PAGE
instrument: injected into an Orbitrap Eclipse Tribrid MS
labeling: the whole workflow in the present analysis was designed to minimize the effects that were described in recent studies
reduction reagent: 30-mM DTT and GE Healthcare 2% IPG buffer pH 3–10
reduction concentration: 30-mM DTT and GE Healthcare 2% IPG buffer pH 3–10
